title: World Leaders Awaited Iran Deal for Months. Here’s Why They’re Still Wary.
summary_full: President Trump’s interim agreement with Iran raises hopes for the calming of the world economy. But it leaves many details for future negotiations, putting the world on edge.
summary_public: President Trump’s interim agreement with Iran raises hopes for the calming of the world economy. But it leaves many details for future negotiations, putting the world on edge.
